arts.ttl: Official Manchester City bid for Omar Marmoush expected this weekend
arts.sum: An official bid from Manchester City for Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush is expected this weekend, according to Florian Plettenburg. The Egyptian international has been high on City’s wish list…

arts.ttl: Frankfurt line up Rennes striker as replacement for Manchester City target Marmoush
arts.sum: Sky Sport Germany transfer specialist Florian Plettenberg has today reported that Eintracht Frankfurt are looking at Rennes forward Arnaud Kalimuendo (23) as a candidate to replace Omar Marmoush, should the Egyptian…

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Pep Guardiola makes stance on new signings crystal clear amid Omar Marmoush, Abdukodir Khusanov, Vitor Reis links
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola makes his feelings "clear" over potential incomings and outgoings at the Etihad Stadium during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Spurs transfer news: Forward being lined up as Omar Marmoush replacement at Eintracht Frankfurt?
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt are allegedly lining up a struggling Tottenham Hotspur attacker as a potential replacement for Omar Marmoush.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola responds to Omar Marmoush claim with Man City transfer update
arts.sum: Reports in Germany suggest that Eintracht Frankfurt star Omar Marmoush has agreed personal terms with Man City

arts.ttl: St. Pauli vs Eintracht Frankfurt preview: Marmoush future talk lingers as campaign restarts
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt travel up north to face St. Pauli this weekend, with the Eagles looking to reset against St.Pauli after two consecutive losses prior to the winter break.

arts.ttl: Why Man City are spending £50m on Omar Marmoush: The Mo Salah similarities, his free-kick party trick... and the reason Nottingham Forest rejected him
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Marinakis should feel very happy with his recent transfer business but the Nottingham Forest owner must wince every time he hears the name of City's next £50million striker.

arts.ttl: Preview: St Pauli vs. Eintracht Frankfurt - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between St Pauli and Eintracht Frankfurt, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Manchester City closing in on €80m agreement for Omar Marmoush
arts.sum: Manchester City are close to reaching a total agreement worth €80m with Eintracht Frankfurt for the signing of Omar Marmoush (25), Foot Mercato can reveal. The 25-year-old reportedly intends to…

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Citizens 'agree personal terms' with Omar Marmoush: When will they make first bid?
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly closing in on the signing of Eintracht Frankfurt striker Omar Marmoush after agreeing personal terms with the 25-year-old.
